meaning: 维堡[苏联西北部港市](临芬兰湾,为一渔业中心)
examples: Someone wrote letter to tell bishop that Nebulas Flacon was a koradji and rascal. They wanted to evict him out of the Vyborg City.
Coordinates to install the surveillance, the Vyborg personnel and should receive money special commissioner and the business agent and the client coordinated work.
